summary: Phase 5 (Gantt View + Capacity Plan) Testing Complete. All 17 backend tests passed, frontend features fully verified. Both modals work correctly with proper data-testid attributes.

issues: React hydration warnings (span inside tr/tbody) - cosmetic only, does not affect functionality. Previously noted in iterations 9-11.

passed_tests: BACKEND: GET /api/gantt-data requires authentication (401 without token)
BACKEND: GET /api/gantt-data returns bars and pending arrays
BACKEND: GET /api/gantt-data bars include machine, order_id, order_number, client, quantity_total, quantity_produced, start_date, end_date, status, priority
BACKEND: GET /api/gantt-data bar status is 'completed' or 'in_progress'
BACKEND: GET /api/gantt-data pending orders have remaining quantity > 0
BACKEND: GET /api/gantt-data supports start_date and end_date query params
BACKEND: GET /api/gantt-data filters results by date range
BACKEND: GET /api/capacity-plan requires authentication (401 without token)
BACKEND: GET /api/capacity-plan returns exactly 14 machines
BACKEND: GET /api/capacity-plan machine names are MAQUINA1-14 in order
BACKEND: GET /api/capacity-plan includes total_produced, active_days, avg_daily_production, remaining_pieces, estimated_days, load_status per machine
BACKEND: GET /api/capacity-plan load_status is idle/green/yellow/red
BACKEND: GET /api/capacity-plan load_status thresholds: <=3=green, 3-7=yellow, >7=red, 0=idle
BACKEND: GET /api/capacity-plan MAQUINA3 is red (7.3 days)
BACKEND: GET /api/capacity-plan MAQUINA5 is green (0.1 days)
BACKEND: GET /api/capacity-plan includes orders_in_progress per machine
FRONTEND: Gantt button (data-testid='gantt-btn') visible in header with GanttChart icon and text 'Gantt'
FRONTEND: PLAN button (data-testid='capacity-plan-btn') visible in header with orange bg and text 'PLAN'
FRONTEND: Gantt modal (data-testid='gantt-modal') opens when clicking Gantt button
FRONTEND: Gantt range selector (data-testid='gantt-range-select') with Semana/2 Semanas/Mes options
FRONTEND: Gantt navigation arrows (data-testid='gantt-prev', 'gantt-next') present
FRONTEND: Gantt chart (data-testid='gantt-chart') renders correctly
FRONTEND: Gantt chart shows 14 machine rows (data-testid='gantt-row-MAQUINA{N}')
FRONTEND: Gantt bars (data-testid='gantt-bar-{order_id}') render for completed/in_progress orders (33 bars found)
FRONTEND: Gantt pending section shows 13 orders with remaining pieces
FRONTEND: Gantt 'Hoy' button (data-testid='gantt-today-btn') present
FRONTEND: Capacity Plan modal (data-testid='capacity-plan-modal') opens when clicking PLAN button
FRONTEND: Capacity Plan summary cards: active machines (14), total produced (2,180), pending pieces (13,425), overloaded (2)
FRONTEND: Capacity Plan shows 14 machine cards (data-testid='plan-machine-MAQUINA{N}')
FRONTEND: Capacity Plan machine cards show load status with color coding
FRONTEND: MAQUINA3 shows 'Sobrecargada' (red) with 7.3 est. days
FRONTEND: MAQUINA5 shows 'Disponible' (green) with 0.1 est. days
FRONTEND: MAQUINA6 shows 'Sobrecargada' (red) with 8.7 est. days
FRONTEND: Machine cards show avg daily production, remaining pieces, estimated days
FRONTEND: Modals close properly with Escape key
critical_code_review_comments: GanttView.js: Clean implementation with custom HTML/CSS chart (no external library)
GanttView.js: Date range handling with week/2weeks/month presets
GanttView.js: All 14 machine rows rendered with data-testid
GanttView.js: Bars show order_number, colored by order (green=completed)
GanttView.js: Pending orders section at bottom with remaining pieces
CapacityPlanModal.js: Summary cards with active/produced/pending/overloaded counts
CapacityPlanModal.js: All 14 machine cards with load status color coding
CapacityPlanModal.js: Status labels: idle='Sin actividad', green='Disponible', yellow='Cargada', red='Sobrecargada'
Dashboard.js lines 2283-2290: Gantt and PLAN buttons correctly positioned with proper data-testid
server.py /api/gantt-data: Returns bars with machine/order/dates and pending orders with remaining qty
server.py /api/capacity-plan: Returns 14 machines with stats and load_status based on estimated_days thresholds

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All Phase 5 Gantt and Capacity Plan features verified

seed_data_creation: Using existing production data. Backend has 33 Gantt bars and 13 pending orders. MAQUINA3 has order with 8000 remaining pieces (red). MAQUINA5 has order with 25 remaining pieces (green).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 5 Gantt View and Capacity Plan fully verified. Gantt shows machine rows, order bars with dates, pending orders. Capacity Plan shows 14 machine cards with load status (idle/green/yellow/red) based on estimated_days thresholds. Summary shows 14 active machines, 2 overloaded (MAQUINA3 and MAQUINA6). Both modals accessible via header buttons with proper data-testid attributes.
